bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting a near-maximum utility bid. The opponent’s opening offer gives me low utility and shows no concession pattern yet, so I will counter with my strongest values across all issues.

At t=0.02 it is still very early, so I am targeting a near-maximal utility bid while making only a tiny concession to avoid simply repeating my previous offer. The opponent’s two offers are both very low utility for me and their second offer is not an improvement, so there is no evidence yet that they are conceding toward my priorities.

I am still targeting a very high-utility bid because it is only t=0.04, and the opponent’s offers remain far from acceptable despite a small concession on issueC. Since issueD has low importance to me and the opponent has varied it, I am making a limited concession there while holding firm on my high-weight issues.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.86 because it is still very early (t=0.06), so there is little reason to make major concessions yet. The opponent’s offers remain very low utility for me and show no meaningful concession pattern, so I am only conceding slightly on a low-weight issue while holding firm on my most important issues.

At t=0.08 it is still very early, so I am targeting a near-maximum utility bid while avoiding repeating my immediately previous offer. The opponent’s bids are still mostly unfavorable to me, though their latest offer conceded issueC to my top value, so I will hold firm on high-weight issues and make only a tiny concession on low-weight issueE.

At t=0.10 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making a modest concession on a low-weight issue rather than moving on issueA or issueB. The opponent’s offers remain very low for my utility and mostly hold issueA/issueB/issueE at valueE, with only occasional movement on issueC/issueD, so I will hold my most important issues firm and vary issueD as the concession point.

At t=0.12 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid for myself while making concessions mainly on lower-weight issues. The opponent’s valid offers mostly push valueE and show only limited/inconsistent concessions, though they recently moved issueB to valueB; I will hold firm on my most valuable issueA and issueC while offering valueE on lower-weight issueD and issueE.

At t=0.14 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making limited concessions on lower-weight issues D and E. The opponent has mostly held issueA/issueB at poor values for me, though their latest offer improved on issueA and issueC, so I will keep my high-weight priorities firm while varying my low-weight concessions.

At t=0.16 it is still early, so I am targeting a strong utility around 0.70 while making limited concessions on lower-cost areas. The opponent’s latest bids show movement toward valueB on issueA/issueB and continued preference for valueE on issueD/issueE, so I will concede issueB and the low-weight issueD/issueE while holding firm on my highest-value issueA and issueC.
